subject: Model readiness assessment — PSQ v37 scoring state (turn 52)

model_version.format: ONNX fp32 + INT8 quantized, served via onnxruntime-node + Node.js on Hetzner CX

training_lineage.note: v37 uses clean Sonnet-only labels. 999 texts previously scored with Opus were re-scored with Sonnet (9,990 scores, separated-llm labeling protocol) before training. The contaminated v35 is the prior production model; v37 replaces it.

dimension_status.note: All 10 dimensions calibrated with quantile-binned-v4-2026-03-08. Held-out n varies due to missing labels in held-out set. MSE reported; MAE = sqrt(MSE) approximation.

threat_exposure.issues: B3 dead zone: model range compression to ~1.85 points in [4.5, 6.4] region. Calibration improved MAE -16.7% but cannot resolve root cause (training label concentration at score 5). Scores in 4.5-6.4 range lack discriminative signal.

hostility_index.issues: None flagged. B4: forms threat pole with TE/AD (partial r: HI-RB = -0.589, highest in bipolar structure).

authority_dynamics.issues: Weakest factor loading (0.332) but strongest criterion predictor across all 4 validity studies (CaSiNo satisfaction, CGA-Wiki derailment, CMV persuasion, DonD deal outcome). Paradox stable and cross-validated. Expert validation protocol designed but not yet started — human ground truth required to confirm construct interpretation. Criterion-based deployment acceptable; interpret scores with awareness that AD measures peer-context status negotiation, not authority in the hierarchical sense.

cooling_capacity.issues: Regressed -0.109 r from v35. B5 M5 bifactor shows CC residual variance = 1.275 (largest across all dims) — structurally diffuse. CC may not form a coherent construct; prioritized for expert validation. Currently above monitoring threshold (r >= 0.40) but trajectory warrants attention.

trust_conditions.issues: None flagged. B4: forms protection pole with RC/RB/CC. Highest g-loading in EFA (TC=0.930).

resilience_baseline.issues: None flagged. B4: forms protection pole. Calibration MAE improvement was largest for this dimension (-16.6%) after quantile binning.

defensive_architecture.issues: Lowest held-out r of any dimension. B4: structural singleton (max |partial r| = 0.205), orthogonal to both threat and protection poles. B5 M5: DA singleton factor (omega_s = 0.067 — meaningful specific variance beyond g). Same expert validation caveat as AD — paradox requires human ground truth.

regulatory_capacity.issues: None flagged. Best MSE of any dimension (0.917). B4: protection pole. EFA g-loading RC=0.854.

contractual_clarity.issues: Regressed -0.106 r from v35. CO rubric updated 2026-03-09 to Variant B: score 5 = 'absent — pure description/self-referential only'; score 4 = 'implicit expectations present but unstated'. Change reduced midpoint concentration by 6pp (+0.23 SD). Above monitoring threshold (r >= 0.40) but just barely. B4: structural singleton (max |partial r| = 0.273) — orthogonal to both poles, unique predictive signal. B5 M5: CO loads only on g (g-only configuration in final model).

energy_dissipation.issues: None flagged. B4: context-dependent singleton. B5 M5: ED loads only on g (g-only configuration). Valid independent predictor in DonD (CGA-Wiki: HI→ED cross-lagged, p=.004, tipping-point pattern at Q4).

b3_dead_zone.finding: TE range compression — model outputs compressed to ~1.85-point range [4.5, 6.4] despite 10-point scale. Root cause: training label concentration (43% at score 5). Quantile-binned calibration improved MAE -16.7% but is a surface fix, not a cure.
b3_dead_zone.production_impact: TE scores in [4.5, 6.4] lack discriminative resolution. Extreme TE values (0-4 or 7-10) are reliable. Profile-level interpretation degrades when TE is in mid-range.
b3_dead_zone.resolution_path: Additional clean TE labels from labeled data pool, or architectural change (single-task ceiling: TE=.762 without multi-task benefit).

b4_bipolar_structure.finding: After g-PSQ removal, strong residual structure: threat pole (TE/HI/AD) vs protection pole (RC/RB/TC/CC), with DA and CO as structural singletons. Mean |partial r| = 0.263 (N=3,433). This explains why 10-dim profile predicts better than g-PSQ aggregate across all criterion studies.
b4_bipolar_structure.production_impact: Profile shape carries predictive signal that aggregate scores miss. When routing scoring requests, preserve per-dimension scores — do not collapse to composite without validation.
b4_bipolar_structure.resolution_path: B5 bifactor model M5 provides formal structural specification.

b5_bifactor_m5.finding: M5 final bifactor model: g-factor + 5-item bipolar factor (TE/HI/AD vs RC/RB) + DA singleton. ED/CO/TC/CC load only on g. omega_h = 0.938 validates g-PSQ as sound composite. RMSEA = 0.1286 (above 0.10 threshold due to CC structural diffuseness at N-sensitivity, not gross misspecification).
b5_bifactor_m5.production_impact: g-PSQ composite is validated (omega_h=0.938). Bipolar factor and DA singleton carry 7-8% additional variance — useful for nuanced interpretation but not required for general scoring.
b5_bifactor_m5.resolution_path: CC expert validation would reduce RMSEA and clarify whether CC belongs in a specific factor.

ready_for: Scoring general conversation, negotiation, social interaction, and online discussion texts within training distribution
Profile-level interpretation (10-dim output) for research and analytical use cases
use_with_caution: Texts where TE context is mid-range (4-6): TE dead zone limits discrimination in this region
High-stakes DA or CC interpretation: expert validation pending, paradox unresolved for DA
CO interpretation in texts with implicit relational expectations: rubric update (Variant B) effective 2026-03-09 — scores before this date used old rubric
not_ready_for: Clinical decision support — no clinical validation, WEIRD distribution flags active
High-stakes individual assessments without human review in the loop
Out-of-distribution text domains (technical documentation, legal, medical) — training distribution is conversational/social interaction
pre_production_checklist_for_new_scoring: Confirm scorer = claude-sonnet-4-6 and interface = claude-code (not API) per labeling policy
Score one dimension per session to prevent halo effect
Ingest into psq.db before training — best_scores view priority: separated-llm > synthetic > joint-llm > composite-proxy
Smoke test: python scripts/distill.py --no-save --epochs 1 before full run

claims.text: v37 held-out r = 0.639, trained on 17,800 Sonnet-only labeled texts, deployed 2026-03-08
claims.confidence_basis: direct read from models/psq-v37/held_out_results.json and training log
direct read from models/psq-student/calibration.json — all 10 keys present with method field confirmed

claims.text: B5 M5 bifactor: CFI=0.9475, RMSEA=0.1286, omega_h=0.938 (g-factor validated)
claims.confidence_basis: values sourced from distillation-research.md §77-79; verified as the accepted M5 final model in MEMORY.md

claims.text: DA is the weakest factor loading (0.332) but strongest criterion predictor across all 4 validity studies
claims.confidence_basis: EFA loading from psychometric-evaluation.md; criterion ranking confirmed across CaSiNo, CGA-Wiki, CMV, DonD studies

claims.text: CC and CO held-out r values are above the r<0.40 monitoring threshold (CC=0.621, CO=0.437) but both regressed from v35
claims.confidence_basis: direct read from models/psq-v37/held_out_results.json; regression delta from MEMORY.md (CC -0.109, CO -0.106)

action_gate.gate_note: No blocking condition. Full model state disclosed. Production endpoint operational and ready for routing decisions.

epistemic_flags: held-out n varies per dimension (88-99/100): DA n=93, CO n=89, DA n=88 — some held-out texts lacked labels for these dims at time of eval
MAE values estimated as sqrt(MSE) — held_out_results.json reports MSE not MAE directly; exact MAE available via eval_held_out.py rerun if needed
expert-validation-not-started: DA and CC construct interpretations are unvalidated against human ground truth — $5,625-15k protocol designed but not funded
b5-rmsea-borderline: RMSEA=0.1286 is above conventional 0.10 threshold; attributed to CC structural diffuseness rather than gross model misspecification, but the attribution itself is inferential

co-rubric-change-2026-03-09: any CO scores generated before this date used the old rubric (score 5 = neutral); new scores use Variant B (score 5 = absent) — comparisons across this date require rubric-version tracking
weird-distribution-flags-active: training data is predominantly English-language, Western, online social interaction — generalization to other cultural or linguistic contexts is unvalidated
